title: Ekuma
description: This modpack upgrades Minecraft's visuals to match trailer quality with, dynamic lighting, and atmospheric effects. It includes vanilla-friendly mods that add new biomes, structures, and mobs, enhancing gameplay
body:
This modpack transforms Minecraft to match the visual quality seen in official trailers. It features high-definition textures, dynamic lighting, and atmospheric effects, creating a more immersive environment.

Additionally, the modpack includes a selection of vanilla-friendly mods that seamlessly integrate new biomes, structures, and mobs into the game. These enhancements enrich the gameplay experience, offering new adventures and discoveries while maintaining the classic Minecraft feel. (This modpack is Heavily based on the Low Res Trailer Recreation Modpack)
